title: API Export Guide
description: Niamoto can publish machine readable outputs alongside the website export. The implementation lives in the exporter layer.
html:
API Export Guide

Niamoto can publish machine-readable outputs alongside the website export. The implementation lives in the exporter layer.

Main exporters

  • src/niamoto/core/plugins/exporters/json_api_exporter.py
  • src/niamoto/core/plugins/exporters/dwc_archive_exporter.py

Export configuration surface

  • exports[*].exporter: exporter plugin name
  • exports[*].params: exporter-specific settings
  • exports[*].groups: exported group targets

Related docs

  • Publish: user-facing publication flow
  • api/modules.rst: autogenerated Python reference
  • external-apis.md: surrounding integration context
